documents.text: TypeScript session service. Rotate refresh tokens, validate signed session cookies, revoke compromised browser sessions, and preserve the current device identifier.
Validate API credentials from authorization headers. Hash service API keys, compare credential scopes, and reject expired machine tokens.
Route inbound SMS messages by sender, destination number, and body keywords. Select the support or billing queue while preserving opt-out handling.
Format and deliver outbound text messages. Normalize phone numbers, split long SMS bodies, attach delivery metadata, and call the messaging provider.
Create a new customer order from cart lines. Validate inventory, calculate totals, reserve stock, and persist the order transaction.
Refund an existing order. Check refundable balance, create a payment reversal, restore inventory, and record the refund reason.
Build a user profile view from account preferences, contact details, avatar settings, locale, and display name.
Resolve user roles and resource permissions. Evaluate organization membership, policy grants, and administrative access boundaries.
Verify payment webhook signatures, reject replayed events, parse processor events, and dispatch invoice or subscription updates.
Generate invoices from billable usage. Apply tax rules, credits, payment terms, line-item rounding, and customer billing addresses.
Read and write typed repository artifacts under .rekon. Verify index paths, artifact headers, SHA-256 digests, containment, and symlink safety.
Load external capability packages from configuration. Validate package specifiers before dynamic import and enforce manifest compatibility and permissions.
Project import evidence into graph nodes and directed import edges. Preserve evidence references and compose deterministic graph slices.
Evaluate import facts and report source files that import generated dist output. Emit governed findings with rule identifiers and evidence references.
Select applicable operator memory for a goal and path. Rank scoped instructions deterministically without rewriting ownership or architecture facts.
Create a work order from a preflight packet. Carry risk notes, findings, required verification commands, success criteria, and anti-gaming guidance.
Publish generated agent guidance from snapshot and resolver artifacts. Include provenance, freshness warnings, required checks, and repository context.
Validate and dry-run reconciliation operations. Apply artifact-only updates when permitted and record applied or deferred operation logs.

queries.text: Where should I change refresh-token rotation for browser sessions?
Find the code that checks scoped API credentials for service integrations.
Modify how incoming text messages are routed to support without changing outbound formatting.
Update long-message splitting and provider delivery metadata for outgoing SMS.
Which implementation reverses a payment and restores stock for a returned order?
Harden replay protection and signature verification for processor callbacks.
Where are artifact index containment and digest checks enforced?
Find the trust boundary before dynamically importing a configured extension package.
Project module dependency evidence into directed graph relationships.
Which policy detects source imports that point into compiled dist directories?
Select path-scoped operator instructions without changing repository ownership facts.
Create an execution packet with risk, required checks, success criteria, and anti-gaming rules.
Regenerate agent guidance with freshness warnings and resolver provenance.
Dry-run an artifact-only reconciliation and record deferred operations.
